overall_pacing.earlyvLateCurve: Yes - but less extreme (slightly faster early)

design_philosophy.storyGating: Hybrid - some features gated by story, some by level

late_game.engagementDriver: Mix of all above (collection, mutations, customization, story, community)

rewards.milestoneRewards: Yes - major rewards at milestone levels (5, 10, 25, 50)

summary.progressionPace: Steady, with slightly faster early-game curve. Players level approximately every 2-3 hours of play.
summary.timelineToMaxLevel: 4-6 months of regular play to reach Level 50

featureProgression.level12_15: Breeding system unlocks (tied to story milestone)
featureProgression.habitatExpansion: Gradual expansion from initial 1 habitat to 8-10 by max level

rewardStrategy.regularLevelUps: Coins for economy + habitat slots for expansion (core rewards)
rewardStrategy.milestoneRewards: Major rewards at levels 5, 10, 25, 50 (story revelations, special cosmetics, feature unlocks)

summary.gatingApproach: Hybrid model - some features like breeding gated by both level AND story progression, while magical habitat is purely story-gated for narrative impact
summary.lateGameEngagement: Multi-faceted approach combining creature collection, rare mutation hunting, shop customization, future community features, and new story content

actPacing.act1_early_game: 2-4 weeks - tutorial phase, learning core mechanics
actPacing.act2_mid_game: 8-12 weeks - deepening mystery, expanded gameplay systems
actPacing.act3_late_game: Variable length - driven by player engagement with collection/customization

developmentNotes.xpCurve: Design with slightly accelerated early progression (levels 1-10), then standard curve (levels 11-50)
developmentNotes.habitatUnlocks: Unlock new habitat slots at: Level 2, 5, 8, 12, 18, 25, 35, 50 (total: 8 standard + magical story-gated)
developmentNotes.breedingGate: Require both Level 12-15 AND completion of Act I story beat
developmentNotes.magicalHabitatGate: Story-only unlock during Act II narrative (no level requirement)
developmentNotes.milestoneImplementation: Levels 5, 10, 25, 50 trigger special reward screens with story/lore elements
developmentNotes.coinRewards: Scale with level to ensure economy remains balanced throughout progression

nextSteps: Transition to Claude Code for development
